care.summary: Bold tropical with leathery leaves in vivid red, orange, yellow, and green patterns.
care.light: Bright direct to indirect; more light = more color
care.water: Keep evenly moist; do not let dry out completely
care.fertilizer: Balanced feed every 4 weeks in growing season
care.toxicity: Mildly toxic; sap can irritate skin
common_issues: Leaf drop from sudden temperature change
Loss of color in insufficient light
tips: Wipe leaves to maintain glossy appearance
Not a fan of being moved; pick a spot and keep it
Great statement plant for bright rooms
